content: Illustrative Morningstar DBRS-style issuer credit assessment for The Goldman Sachs Group, dated 2025-11-02 on Q3 fundamentals as of 2025-09-30. The assessment agrees with the other anchor at A (mid), the same notch. Two providers cluster tightly here; the divergence for Goldman Sachs comes entirely from a third provider that sits far below this consensus.
disclaimer: Synthetic, illustrative — not Morningstar DBRS data.
